title: Bubble Sort Array in Reverse Order

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: First line with a count and second line with elements (space separated, each on its line)
statement.outputFormat: Sorted elements (space separated, one per line)
statement.notes: Input array can be empty. Sorting order can be ascending or descending.
